title: Defend the Find
author: Tuomas Pirinen
description: Defend a building from attackers.

title: Skirmish
author: Tuomas Pirinen
description: Brawl between rival warbands.

title: Wyrdstone Hunt
author: Tuomas Pirinen
description: Gain wealth by picking up wyrdstone.

title: Breakthrough
author: Tuomas Pirinen
description: The attacker needs to reach the other side of the board.

title: Street Fight
author: Tuomas Pirinen
description: Both warbands try to reach the other side of the street.

title: Chance Encounter
author: Tuomas Pirinen
description: Two warbands try to steal each other's wyrdstone.

title: Hidden Treasure
author: Tuomas Pirinen
description: Search the buildings for a hidden treasure.

title: Occupy
author: Tuomas Pirinen
description: Both warbands try to capture as many buildings as they can.

title: Surprise Attack
author: Tuomas Pirinen
description: The Defender tries to fend off the attacker and starts with limited numbers.

title: Treasure Hunt
author: Mark Havener
description: Multiplayer. Similar to Wyrdstone Hunt.

title: Street Brawl
author: Mark Havener
description: Multiplayer. Similar to Skirmish.

title: The Lost Prince
author: Mark Havener
description: The warbands have heard rumours that a powerful man's son has wandered into the ruins and a handsome reward will be paid for his return.

title: The Wizard's Mansion
author: Mark Havener
description: Multiplayer. Similar to Skirmish with items at stake.

title: The Pool
author: Mark Havener
description: Multiplayer. Root around for Wyrdstone in a pool in the centre of the table.

title: Ambush!
author: Mark Havener
description: Multiplayer. Wyrdstone carrying defenders have to get off the table alive.

title: Monster Hunt
author: Mark Havener
description: Multiplayer. Warbands team up (or not) to take on a monster.

title: Kidnapped
author: Tuomas Pirinen
description: Possessed vs. any warband. Rescue a fair maiden before she gets sacrificed or sacrifice a fair maiden before she gets rescued, depending on your mood.

title: Rat Attack
author: Christian Ellegaard
description: Skaven vs. any warband. Sewers. Defender must escape from opposite table edge. Skaven uses a mixture of decoy counters and warband counters to confuse the enemy.

title: Scourge & Purge
author: Donato Ranzato
description: Witch Hunters vs. any warband. Skirmish in the company of a possessed wizard.

title: Surrounded
author: Christian Ellegaard
description: Sewers. Defender must escape from centre of sewer network.

title: Forbidden Square
author: Donato Ranzato
description: A Witch Hunter Warband has been sent into a specific part of the City of the Damned by prominent members of the Order of the Templars of Sigmar.

title: Stake-Out
author: Gavin Thorpe
description: Sneaky attackers must kill the leader of the startled defenders. Defenders' leader must escape from table.

title: The Lair of the Snake
author: Christian Ellegaard
description: Four player scenario. Each player must take out his randomly specified enemy.

title: The Script of Sigmar
author: Paul Smith
description: Witch Hunters vs. Sisters of Sigmar. Two linked scenarios involving burgling the Sisters' Abbey.

title: That's All Mine
author: Paul Smith
description: Attackers blow up a mine using gunpowder rules from Archive Pestilens (shamefully not described in the magazine) amid some random zombie shenanigans.

title: The Caravan
author: Honza Skypala & Stepan Stepanov
description: Escort or rob a merchant's caravan train.

title: The Secrets of Beujuntae
author: Stephanus Cornette
description: Wyrdstone Hunt while a Daemon spirit flits around possessing random Heroes.

title: Jungle Skirmish / The Fog of War
author: Stephanus Cornette
description: Light fog affecting movement and missile range.

title: Island Hopping
author: Stephanus Cornette
description: Islands in a fast flowing river connected by bridges. Control as many as possible.

title: The Night Of The Headless One
author: Kevin J Coleman
description: Hidden Treasure except warbands look for skull of the Headless One while its awesome original owner creates carnage.

title: The Hunters Become The Hunted
author: Lustria Development Team
description: Similar to Surprise Attack.

title: Lost Temple Of The Slann
author: Lustria Development Team
description: Similar to Wizard's Mansion.

title: The Sword of the Herald
author: Jeff Hogg
description: Multiplayer scenario involving a mean sword, huge chunks of Wyrdstone & those ever-popular random zombies.

title: Finders Keepers
author: Roger Latham
description: Run the length of the table, grab the Wyrdstone & run back again while trying not to die. Designed for mounted warriors but doesn't have to be.

title: Mule Train
author: Robert J Walker
description: The good guys try to lead the mule train along a country road while the bad guys try to steal them.

title: Death in the Mists
author: Nicodemus Kyme
description: Visibility reduced to 2D6". Warriors might get lost.

title: Gift of the Truthsayers
author: Nicodemus Kyme
description: Scrap over a magic item with random boggy happenings.

title: The Mummy
author: Rob Houdek
description: Hidden Treasure except warbands look for the stash of a mummy while its scary original owner plus friends have their say.

title: The Ogham Stones
author: Nicodemus Kyme
description: Enhance powers for spell-casters with Truthsayers & Dark Emissaries tagging along for good measure.

title: Haunted Treasure
author: Michael Reuvers
description: Serious treasure guarded by equally serious Banshee.

title: A Night In The Graveyard
author: Jason "Teacher Guy" Kahler
description: Warbands compete to plunder a dead man's grave while his restless spirit attempts to stop them.

title: Bar Room Brawl
author: Jason "Teacher Guy" Kahler
description: A bar room brawl. Players start with 3 warriors in bar with more arriving during battle.

title: Defend the Oasis
author: Khemri Development Team
description: Attackers must get more men within 6" of a well than the defenders. Defenders must cause a rout test.

title: Tomb Raid
author: Khemri Development Team
description: As Defend The Tomb except the chest begins in the middle of the complex while both warbands begin at the edges.

title: Protect the Prince
author: Khemri Development Team
description: Protect the Merchant's son.

title: Burn the Witches
author: Nicodemus Kyme
description: Set in a huge temple which burns to the ground during the battle. Defender's Heroes must carry three relics from the temple. Attackers must stop them.

title: One Man's Rescue is Another Man's Kidnap
author: Khemri Development Team
description: A prisoner is being guarded within one of several tents. The attacker must find the prisoner by entering the correct tent and then escort him from the table.

title: The Gauntlet
author: Erik Johnson
description: Classic Indiana Jones stuff. Warbands race along trap-laden corridors towards a great treasure. For 2+ warbands.

title: Assault on the Rock
author: Grayson Gaudreault
description: Warbands infiltrate the Sisters' rock and attempt to steal a magical tome.

title: In The Dead Of The Night
author: Space McQuirk & Chris Blair
description: Set in Mordheim's Cemetery of Saint Voller. Graveyard battle with Undead warband, half is which is unavailable, as the defenders.

title: A Stroll In The Garden
author: Anonymous
description: Skirmish set in Mordheim's Steinhardt Memorial Gardens. Warriors within 2â€ of a tree or bush receive hits from the chaos-wracked foliage.

title: The Bodyguards
author: Anonymous
description: Town Cryer edit of "Now Keep Me Safe, You Hear!?"

title: Blood Hunt
author: Mark Havener, et al.
description: Clashing warbands gain the help of a Dramatis Personae, most likely Johann The Knife & Marriana Chevaux, free of charge.

title: Bounty Hunting
author: Mark Havener, et al.
description: An Empire In Flames scenario. Warbands attempt to round up a gang of bandits who are holed up in a remote hideout building.

title: Down At The Docks
author: Mark Havener, et al.
description: Warbands must attempt to gain cargo crates from smugglers' ship by carrying them off.

title: Lost In The Bogs
author: Mark Havener, et al.
description: An Empire In Flames scenario. Highest rated warband is lost & must be deployed spread out.

title: Stagecoash Ambush
author: Mark Havener, et al.
description: An Empire In Flames scenario. Defenders on horseback must protect a stagecoach from mounted attackers.

title: The Item Lost
author: Mark Havener, et al.
description: Nicodemus joins one warband in an attempt to retrieve a magic wand. Naturally the other warbands would like the wand for themselves.

title: The Thing In The Woods
author: Mark Havener, et al.
description: An Empire In Flames scenario. At least 1/2 the terrain is spooky fear-inducing woods.

title: Gathering of the Horde
author: Nicodemus Kyme
description: Massive multi-warband gang fight based upon the â€œGangs Of New Yorkâ€ film, complete with special rules for horde fighting.

title: The Watchers
author: Mark Havener, et al.
description: Warbands attempt to gather random treasures from the SE quarter of Mordheim (right next to where the comet landed).

title: The Frenzied Mob
author: Anonymous
description: An Empire In Flames scenario. Warbands attempt to loot a village consisting of D3+1 buildings. Each building is staunchly defended by D3+1 frenzied villagers.

title: Encampment Raid
author: Anonymous
description: Attackers attempt to take the defenders' camp. Plays as Defend The Find except the defenders have a number of advantages due to being on home turf.

title: The Rat's Lair
author: Aaron Ishmael
description: Designed for several warbands to ally against a pack of Skaven run by a moderator. The warbands descend into an ingenious multi-leveled underground lair.

title: Upon the Eerie Downs
author: Nick Kyme
description: A sombre and mysterious place, the Eerie Downs holds a palpable dread for the folk of the Mark.

title: Battle for the Farm
author: Nick Kyme
description: There are many farmsteads around Ostermark. Mercenaries and brigands are drawn to them like moths to the flame as.

title: Blood on the Pasturelands
author: Nick Kyme
description: Rival warbands attempt to rustle some horses from a pasture. The frightened horses run randomly and need taming once caught. They are defended by six Outriders.

title: Through Black Fire Pass
author: Nick Kyme
description: One warband ambushes another as they make their way along the treacherous trade route.

title: Brigands in the Pasturelands
author: Nick Kyme
description: One warband attempts to hunt down the other, a lawless band of brigands hiding out In the forest.

title: The Watchtower
author: Nick Kyme
description: Half of the defending warband starts on or near a well-defended central tower (with special rules to reflect this).

title: Wolf Hunt!
author: Nick Kyme
description: Both warbands have been offered a reward to kill a pack of troublesome wolves.

title: Protect Hornsby's Ferry!
author: Mark Havener
description: Defenders must protect a boat & pull-rope style river ferry-crossing from sabotage. Attackers must sabotage it.

title: Stop Thief!
author: Mark Havener
description: Defenders must protect Halfling Thief HS (featured In this issue) from attacking warband.

title: Hunt the Heretic
author: Nick Kyme
description: Four members of the defenders' warband attempt to protect a tooled-up Warlock HS from the attackers plus an accompanying Witch Hunter Captain.

title: River Watch
author: Nick Kyme
description: Attackers at the south side must smuggle some loot across a east-west flowing river at night and get 25% of their band off the north edge.

title: Night Of The Dead
author: Andy Tabor
description: Warband members must venture to the centre of the board, grab a Wyrdstone shard and escape from the table.

title: Happy Harpy Hunting Grounds
author: Chris Van Tigem
description: A group of 3 Harpies have nested in one of the tall buildings and their scavenging and attacks on unfortunate warbands has ensured a sizable stash of valuables.

title: Round-up at the Mordheim Corral
author: Andy Tabor
description: Two to four wild boars have eaten a merchant's Wyrdstone. Warbands must kill randomly moving and aggressive boars to recover it. Optional suggestion of using mutations.

title: The Recipe
author: Mark Havener
description: Warbands must attempt to abduct an esteemed pie-maker who is being stoutly defended by his ballistically adept bodyguard.

title: Ambush
author: Andrew "Boss Orc"
description: Some more devious gangs use the element of surprise as a safer alternative to a drawn out battle of attrition. These gangs are often smaller than their rivals and use the surprise to their advantage.

title: Ambush
author: Michael Reuvers
description: One warband is on the way back to their encampment with the wyrdstone they found in the ruins when suddenly they are surrounded.

title: Breakthrough
author: Andrew "Boss Orc"
description: Warbands must get half their models off opposite edge.

title: Defend the Village!
author: Mark "Rinku" Dewis
description: The Magnificent Seven without the cowboy hats.

title: Don't Wake the Giant
author: David Gitchel
description: Two warbands fight for the giant's goodies while trying not to wake him.

title: Grudge Match
author: Mark "rinku" Dewis
description: Honorable duel between two rival heroes, watched by their warbands and with a serious chance of crowd trouble breaking out.

title: Haunted Treasure
author: Michael Reuvers
description: There is a rumor that a treasure of unimaginable wealth lies in the ruins of a old house. Unfortunately, it is also rumored that the treasure is guarded by evil spirit who's howl is so terrible it will make you go mad. Two rival warbands have heard about this house and have come to loot the treasure, if they can.

title: It's all MINE!!
author: Paul Smith
description: Attackers blow up a mine using gunpowder rules from Archive Pestilens (shamefully not described in the magazine) amid some random zombie shenanigans.

title: Raid
author: Andrew "Boss Orc"
description: Attack on warband's camp. Defender in centre, attacker on edges.

title: Raids
author: Christian Ellegaard
description: Bad warband vs. townsfolk; Raid a village for loot & slaves.

title: Rawhide
author: Paul Smith
description: Get a wagon train across the board using wagon rules from Wyrdstone Archive while your opponent tries to stop you.

title: Rescue
author: Andrew "Boss Orc"
description: Rescue captive warrior. Defender in centre, attacker on edges.

title: Romero's Pride
author: Paul Smith, Lex & Donato
description: A variation on the random zombie invasion theme.

title: Scourge and Purge
author: Donato Ranzato
description: None

title: Scripts of Sigmar
author: Paul Smith
description: Witch Hunters vs. Sisters of Sigmar. Two linked scenarios involving burgling the Sisters' Abbey.

title: The Battle At Koleshire Keep
author: Baby Cindi
description: Skirmish over a keep.

title: The Caravan
author: Unknown
description: Guard or plunder a caravan of gold before it gets to the other side.

title: The Forbidden Square
author: Christian Ellegaard
description: None

title: The Restless Dead
author: Tom Webster-Deakin
description: Random zombies invade the table, attacking both players.

title: The Square Of The Snake
author: Christian Ellegaard
description: Four player scenario. Each player must take out his randomly specified enemy.

title: The Wizard's Tower
author: Christian Ellegaard
description: Your warband is peacefully making their way through the city to a Wyrdstone deposit when they are set upon be a rival warband. They have no choice but to fight their way through them to get to the Wyrdstone.

title: Mordheim's Burning
author: Rowan Coupland
description: This scenario is set at the end of Mordheim's existence, and provides a very fitting ending to a campaign.
